text: Code reviews are an essential part of software development. When developers review each other's code, they can catch bugs early before the code is used in a real project. This saves time and effort, as fixing problems later is much more difficult. Beyond finding mistakes, code reviews are great for knowledge sharing. Experienced team members can suggest better ways to write code, and newer developers learn new techniques. This process helps build a stronger team overall, as everyone improves together. In the end, code reviews lead to higher quality software and make the whole team more skilled and confident.
